title: Google intercepts a massive cyberattack powered by first-ever AI-generated zero-day exploit
snippet: Google claims to have thwarted a significant cyberattack by state-sponsored hackers using an AI-developed zero-day exploit. The vulnerability, which bypassed two-factor authentication in an unnamed tool, was disclosed to the vendor before widespread exploitation could occur.

title: Forza Horizon 6 leaked days ahead of launch, unencrypted 155GB build accidentally hits Steam
snippet: Forza Horizon 6 is set to launch on May 19, but a leak has allowed pirates to access unencrypted files ahead of time. Players may face risks like malware and Xbox bans from using pirated versions.&nbsp;

title: AI wins have Alphabet poised to become world’s biggest company
snippet: Alphabet Inc. is rapidly closing in on Nvidia Corp. for the title of the world's largest company. Alphabet's strong presence in AI, from search to cloud and its own AI models, positions it for significant growth. Investors see Alphabet's diversified business as a key advantage.

title: California county sues Meta over scam ads
snippet: Santa Clara County has filed a lawsuit against Meta Platforms, claiming that the company profited from deceptive advertisements circulating on Facebook and Instagram. According to the lawsuit, Meta's conduct violates California's regulations related to false advertising and unfair competition.

title: Enterprise AI firm Fractal Analytics posts 17% rise in Q4 revenue; profit doubles to Rs 115 crore
snippet: Fractal Analytics saw a sharp profit increase in the March quarter, fueled by strong demand for enterprise AI services.
